---
name: Content Request
about: Request a new topic, lesson, or learning module
title: "[CONTENT] "
labels: content, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Topic

What technology or concept should be covered?

## Learning Path

Which learning path does this belong to?

- [ ] Foundations (Linux, Networking, Git)
- [ ] Containerization (Docker, Podman)
- [ ] Orchestration (Kubernetes, Helm)
- [ ] Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
- [ ] CI/CD & Automation (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, ArgoCD)
- [ ] Cloud & SRE (AWS, GCP, Monitoring)

## Suggested Content

Describe what the lesson or module should cover:

- Key concepts
- Hands-on exercises
- Real-world scenarios

## Target Audience

Who would benefit from this content? (beginner, intermediate, advanced)

## Additional Context

Links to existing resources, documentation, or references that could help.
